text: Change the building's stone facade to a vibrant red brick texture while keeping the architectural details and clock visible.

demos.text: Change the building's roof from blue metal to a vibrant red tile, and replace the overcast sky with a warm golden sunset, casting long shadows across the facade.

Transform the building into a vibrant, sun-drenched Parisian scene with warm golden hour lighting, enhancing the stone textures and casting long shadows, while adding lush green plants on the balconies.
Transform the scene into a vibrant, sun-drenched afternoon with golden hour lighting, enhancing the warm tones of the stone facade and casting long, soft shadows across the street and stairs.
Change the architectural style of the building to a futuristic design with sleek glass surfaces and metallic structures, while maintaining its classical proportions and grand scale.
Change the sky to a dramatic sunset with warm orange and pink hues, while keeping the building and palm tree unchanged.

Convert the image to a vibrant color palette, replacing the black and white tones with warm autumn colors: golden yellows and burnt oranges on the building facades, deep reds on the pavement, and rich browns on the tree branches, while keeping the overall lighting and composition the same.

Transform the building into a vibrant autumn scene by changing the flower boxes to display rich fall foliage in shades of crimson, gold, and burnt orange, while keeping the architectural details and overall structure intact.

Transform the black wall into a vibrant mural featuring a lush jungle scene with exotic animals and tropical plants, while keeping the stone wall structure and the building in the background unchanged.

text: Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and translucent washes of color, while maintaining the focus on the carpenter's hands and tools.

demos.text: Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and translucent washes of color, while keeping the wooden frame, drill, and workshop elements clearly recognizable.

Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor style, with soft, bleeding edges and translucent washes of color, while maintaining the detailed depiction of the woodturning process and the wood shavings.
Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and translucent color washes, while keeping the main subject and lighting direction recognizable.
Transform the image into a watercolor painting style while maintaining the focus on the hand plane, softening the background details and enhancing the warm wooden tones.
Transform the image into a dramatic, high-contrast black and white photograph with a cinematic lighting style, emphasizing the textures of the wood and the worker's safety gear.
Transform the scene into a dramatic oil painting style, enhancing the contrast and richness of the colors, with thick impasto brushstrokes on the blood and knife to emphasize texture and emotion.
Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, enhancing the colors of the clothing and background while maintaining the focus on the woman and children working with stone.
Transform the sneakers into a vibrant watercolor painting style, blending the yellow and black patterns with soft, flowing brushstrokes and translucent color layers.

text: Change the sofa fabric to a shimmering, metallic silver material with a brushed metal texture, while keeping the same shape and structure.

text: Change the robot's eyes from green to glowing red, and add subtle sparks and smoke effects around its joints to make it look like it's overheating during a battle.

text: Change the product packaging to a sleek, modern glass bottle with a metallic silver dropper cap, replacing the current cardboard tube with a minimalist white background and soft lighting.

demos.text: Transform the scene into a dramatic nighttime setting with moody, cool-toned lighting. Replace the natural daylight with a soft, ethereal blue glow emanating from behind the products, creating long shadows and a mysterious ambiance. Add a subtle mist or fog around the base of the products to enhance the dreamy atmosphere.

text: Change the red double-decker bus to a vintage green steam-powered bus with large wheels and a smokestack, maintaining the rainy London street scene.

demos.text: Change the red double-decker bus into a vintage yellow taxi cab with a "For Hire" sign on the roof, while keeping the couple and the street scene unchanged.
Change the double-decker bus to a vintage red trolleybus with wooden paneling and large windows, matching the classic style of early 20th-century public transport.
Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting style, softening the sharp edges of the buildings and bus while enhancing the reflections in the puddle with flowing, blended colors.
Convert the image to a vibrant color version, changing the wet cobblestone street to deep red and the telephone box to bright blue, while keeping the rain and atmosphere realistic.

Convert the image to a vibrant color palette while maintaining the vintage composition, giving the crowd and the double-decker bus rich, saturated colors typical of a bustling mid-20th century city scene.
Transform the red telephone booth into a glowing, futuristic version with neon blue light emanating from its windows and crown, while keeping the surrounding suburban environment unchanged.
Change the scene to a snowy winter day with snow falling gently, covering the ground and the car, while Mr. Bean and the crowd remain unchanged.

Transform the image into a vibrant, full-color photograph while maintaining the vintage street scene, emphasizing the rich red, white, and blue of the American flag, the green of the trees, and the natural tones of the cars and clothing.

text: Transform the topographic map into a vibrant watercolor painting style, blending the green terrain with soft blues and earthy tones, while keeping all geographic details clearly visible.

demos.text: Transform the topographic map into a vibrant watercolor painting, blending the green terrain with soft blue lakes and white snow-capped peaks, using expressive brushstrokes to highlight the contours and labels.

Convert the topographic map into a vibrant watercolor painting style, preserving all geographic labels and contour lines but rendering the colors in soft, blended watercolor washes with a dominant palette of ochre, burnt sienna, and muted teal.

Transform the map into a vibrant watercolor painting, blending the landmasses with soft green and yellow washes and the water with gentle blue gradients, while keeping all text and geographic labels legible.
Transform the map into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, bleeding edges on the topographic lines and water features, while keeping all labels and geographic details clearly legible.
Transform the topographic map into a vibrant watercolor painting, with the river rendered in flowing blue watercolor washes and the terrain in soft, blended earth tones of ochre, sienna, and green.

Transform the map into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and a palette of warm terracotta, sage green, and sky blue, while preserving the geographical details and text labels.
Convert the map into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft blue and green washes for the rivers and land, while preserving the intricate details of the text and compass.

Transform the topographic map into a vibrant watercolor painting style, preserving the original layout and contours but replacing the green and black areas with soft, blended watercolor washes in earthy tones like ochre, burnt sienna, and muted teal, while keeping the river and roads as thin, dark outlines.

text: Change the lighting to a warm, golden hour glow, casting long shadows and highlighting the vintage car's polished black surface.

demos.text: Convert the image to a vibrant color palette, making the vintage car a rich, glossy black with chrome accents, the bow and ribbon bright white, and the background a warm, sunny suburban scene with green trees and a clear blue sky.
Transform the scene into a vibrant, sun-drenched afternoon with warm golden hour lighting, enhancing the yellow tones of the building and cars, and adding long, soft shadows across the gravel road.

Change the black and white photograph into a vibrant colorized version, giving the car a deep red body with chrome accents, the men's coats rich dark brown and charcoal gray, and the background a soft autumnal palette of muted oranges and yellows.
Change the red vintage car in the sleigh to a futuristic, glowing blue hovercraft with soft light trails.
Change the color scheme of the vintage car and the man's suit to a monochromatic sepia tone, while keeping the background and the eagle emblem in full color to create a striking contrast.
Transform the scene into a vibrant, sun-drenched afternoon with a warm golden hour glow, enhancing the sunlight on the wooden buildings and casting long, dramatic shadows across the dusty street.
Change the lighting to a cool blue twilight, making the truck and wave appear as if they are illuminated by moonlight instead of the warm sunburst.
Change the scene from a sunny daytime to a misty, golden hour sunset with long shadows and warm, soft lighting, while keeping the horse-drawn carriage and riders in the same position.

text: Transform the image into a watercolor painting style, softening the edges and blending the colors of the floral patterns and fabric textures while maintaining the composition and details of the face masks and pillow.

demos.text: Change the checkered patterns on all three face masks to a floral pattern with soft pastel colors, while keeping the same mask shape and elastic ear loops.
Change the mask's pattern from anchors to a repeating pattern of small sailboats in white.
Change the color of the crocheted face masks from olive green to a vibrant sunflower yellow while keeping the same texture and lighting.
Transform the fabric patch into a vibrant watercolor painting style, softening the edges and blending the colors with painterly brushstrokes while maintaining the original pattern layout.
Change the artistic style to a vibrant watercolor painting, with soft, blended colors and visible brush strokes, while keeping the composition and objects recognizable.
Change the boy's blue puffer jacket to a red plaid flannel shirt layered over a white t-shirt, keeping the same pose and background.

Transform the colorful abstract face on the mask into a realistic human face with natural skin tones and subtle facial features, while keeping the mask's structure and black fabric background unchanged.
Change the background to a vibrant cityscape at sunset, with warm orange and pink hues reflecting off skyscrapers, while keeping the couple in sharp focus in the foreground.

text: Change the color scheme to a vibrant neon gradient, making the sports bra and leggings glow with electric blue and hot pink hues, while keeping the hangers and rod in their original wood tone.

demos.text: Change the color scheme to a vibrant neon palette, making the sports bra black with bright electric blue trim and a glowing neon pink outline around the edges, while keeping the icons and background unchanged.
Change the color scheme to a vibrant neon palette, making the leggings glow with neon green and electric blue accents against a dark, almost black background.
Change the color of the leggings from navy blue to a vibrant fiery red with a subtle metallic sheen, while keeping the same fit and texture.
Change the woman's outfit to a vibrant red sports bra and matching red athletic leggings, while keeping the white sneakers and the studio setting.
Change the orange corduroy outfit to a vibrant blue denim set with matching textures and lighting.
Change the color scheme from burgundy to a vibrant electric blue, keeping the same outfit style and poses.
Change the color of the three pairs of pants to a deep forest green while maintaining the same lighting, texture, and hanger setup.
Change the woman's sports bra to a vibrant red color with a subtle geometric pattern, while keeping the same style and fit.

text: Change the color scheme to a metallic silver and deep navy blue, making the dollar bill and certificate appear as if they are made of polished metal with a cool, reflective finish.

demos.text: Change the color scheme from bright yellow and neon green to a dark, moody palette with deep navy blue and metallic silver, giving the image a high-end, luxurious feel while keeping the fan of money as the central focus.
Convert the banknote into a glowing, ethereal version with bioluminescent purple and blue patterns that pulse softly, while maintaining the intricate Art Nouveau details and central eagle emblem.
Change the blue t-shirt to a vibrant red color while keeping the dollar bill graphic unchanged.
Change the silver coins to golden coins with a polished, reflective gold finish while keeping the black velvet case and arrangement.
Transform the banknote into a glowing, futuristic hologram with neon blue and purple energy lines pulsing around the number 5000 and ornate patterns, set against a dark, starry background.
Change the color scheme from black and white to a vibrant red and gold, making the bill look like a luxury or commemorative version.
Transform the 1918 Federal Reserve Note into a vibrant, full-color oil painting with rich, saturated hues, while maintaining the original intricate details and portrait of Abraham Lincoln.
Change the metallic silver coins to have a warm, golden bronze finish with a slightly worn, aged patina, while keeping the intricate engravings and details intact.

text: Convert the poster into a vibrant watercolor painting style, enhancing the colors of the mountains, sky, and clothing while maintaining the original composition and text.

demos.text: Convert the photograph to a vibrant color palette, replacing the sepia tones with rich, natural colors: the man's suit should be a deep navy blue, his bow tie a burgundy red, the woman's dress a rich chocolate brown with dark red accents on the lace collar, and the tablecloth a warm terracotta with deep green floral patterns. Maintain the same lighting and composition.

Change the silhouette of Sherlock Holmes into a detailed, realistic portrait while maintaining the same pose and pipe, and transform the background into a foggy Victorian London street scene with gas lamps and old buildings.

Transform the banknote into a vibrant watercolor painting, keeping the intricate details of the portraits and ornate borders intact while replacing the monochrome ink with soft, flowing watercolor hues of teal, gold, and cream.

Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting, softening the edges of the figures and clothing while enhancing the misty forest background with flowing watercolor washes in warm golden and amber tones.
Change the book cover to a vibrant watercolor style, transforming the sepia-toned photograph into a colorful, painterly depiction of the man, while keeping the text and overall composition intact.

Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, enhancing the greens and browns with soft, blended washes and visible brushstrokes, while preserving the original composition and details of the woman and forest.
Convert the stamp illustration into a vibrant watercolor painting style, keeping the same composition and details but replacing the line art with soft, blended watercolor textures and colors.

Convert the photograph to a vibrant watercolor painting style, preserving the group composition and individual features while replacing the monochrome tones with rich, blended colors and soft brushstroke textures.

text: Change the cardboard sign to a shiny, metallic silver surface with the text "iPhone 12" in bold, futuristic blue font and a glowing neon smiley face.

demos.text: Change the background to a vibrant cityscape at night with neon lights reflecting on a wet street, while keeping the phones and AppleCare+ card in focus with their current lighting.
Change the Apple logo on the screen to a glowing, futuristic version with neon blue and purple outlines, and add a subtle digital particle effect around it.
Change the t-shirt to a vibrant red color while keeping the smiley face design and wooden hanger.
Change the phone's screen display to show a vibrant sunset beach scene with palm trees and ocean waves, while keeping the hand and phone casing unchanged.
Change the background to a futuristic cityscape at night with glowing neon lights and holographic advertisements, while keeping the product packaging and phone in focus.
Change the green card to a metallic silver finish with reflective highlights, giving it a premium, high-end look while keeping all text and logos intact.
Change the central white square to have a metallic silver finish with subtle reflections, as if made of brushed aluminum, while keeping the text and background unchanged.
Change the cracked smartphone screen to a vibrant, glowing digital display showing a futuristic cityscape at night with neon lights and flying vehicles.

text: Transform the burning heart into a shattered glass heart with sharp, reflective fragments, keeping the fiery glow but making it emanate from within the cracks instead of surrounding the object.

demos.text: Transform the central heart into a glowing, translucent crystal heart with internal light emanating from within, while maintaining the lace detailing and red ribbon elements.
Transform the heart into a glowing, translucent glass sculpture with a swirling nebula inside, replacing the current blue and red patterns with a vibrant mix of purple, pink, and gold cosmic clouds.
Change the metallic sphere to a glowing, translucent crystal sphere with internal lightning effects, while keeping the hand and the outer space background.
Change the heart-shaped gemstone from blue to a glowing, translucent red, giving it an ethereal, magical appearance.
Change the stone to appear as if it's glowing with an inner bioluminescent light, casting a soft blue and green glow on the surface and background.
Change the color scheme from green and blue to fiery red and orange, making the glowing energy appear as molten lava and the crystals as glowing embers.
Change the red heart to a glowing, translucent blue heart with soft light emanating from within, while keeping the doctor's hands and lab coat unchanged.
Change the red heart pillow to a heart-shaped balloon floating on the water, with a string trailing behind it.

text: Transform the bouquet into a vibrant summer arrangement by changing the pink roses to bright yellow sunflowers, keeping the daisies, and adding a few purple lavender sprigs. Change the green stems to a mix of yellow and purple, and replace the clear glass jar with a rustic woven wicker basket.

demos.text: Change the bouquet to include deep red roses instead of pink, and add a few sprigs of eucalyptus for contrast, while keeping the same metal bucket and white background.
Transform the bouquet into a watercolor painting style, softening the edges of the roses and leaves while maintaining the vibrant pink and red hues.
Change the bouquet to a winter-themed arrangement with white and silver flowers, including snowflakes and pine branches, and replace the purple vase with a clear glass one filled with ice cubes.
Change the color of the roses to deep burgundy and the hydrangeas to a soft lavender, while keeping the green leaves and silver vase unchanged.
Change the bouquet from roses to a mix of white hydrangeas and baby's breath, keeping the pink box and ribbon.
Change the daisies to red poppies with black centers while keeping the white pitcher and minimal background.
Change the bouquet to deep red roses while keeping the same arrangement and background, and replace the orange slices with red rose petals.

Transform the bouquet into a vibrant, tropical arrangement by replacing the pink and white roses and anemones with hibiscus and plumeria flowers, while keeping the green foliage and lace-wrapped stem. Change the background to a soft-focus beach scene with turquoise water and palm trees.

text: Change the background from plain gray to a traditional Japanese kitchen setting with wooden shelves, hanging pots, and soft ambient lighting.

demos.text: Change the background to a vibrant, sunlit kitchen with wooden shelves and hanging herbs, making the product appear as if it's on display in a cozy artisanal food shop.
Change the lighting to a warm golden hour glow, making the steam appear more luminous and casting long shadows across the wooden table.

Change the product packaging to feature a traditional Chinese painting style, with the character and noodle bowl rendered in ink wash and watercolor, while keeping the red background and text readable.
Transform the image into a vibrant anime style with bold outlines and saturated colors, making the steam appear as glowing, swirling energy lines.
Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, enhancing the colors of the shrimp soup and fresh ingredients while maintaining the rustic wooden background.
Change the menu to a vintage retro style with warm sepia tones, adding a subtle film grain effect and rounded corners to the image, while keeping all text and food items clearly visible.
Transform the scene into a vibrant anime style with bold outlines, exaggerated colors, and a playful, slightly surreal atmosphere, while keeping the noodle bowl and surrounding elements recognizable.
Transform the image into a watercolor painting style while maintaining the original composition and subject matter.

text: Transform the lavender field into a surreal landscape with glowing bioluminescent purple flowers that emit a soft light, while keeping the text and overall composition unchanged.

demos.text: Transform the lavender field into a field of glowing bioluminescent flowers under a starry night sky, with soft blue and purple light emanating from the plants and a galaxy visible in the dark sky.
Change the background of the product box to a soft, blurred lavender field under a warm sunset sky.

Transform the scene into a dreamy, ethereal landscape by changing the purple flowers to glowing bioluminescent blue, adding soft, floating particles of light around them, and shifting the lighting to a twilight ambiance with a deep indigo sky.
Transform the scene into a vibrant sunset with warm golden light, changing the sky to rich orange and pink hues, making the purple flowers glow and casting long shadows across the field.

Transform the garden scene into a surreal nighttime fantasy by changing the lighting to a soft, ethereal bioluminescent glow. Make the flowers emit a gentle purple and white light, the gravel path shimmer with tiny glowing specks, and the sky filled with a soft aurora borealis in shades of purple and green.

Transform the scene into a dramatic, moody atmosphere by changing the lighting to a deep twilight blue, adding soft glowing orbs of light among the flowers, and making the couple's clothing appear as if made of shimmering, ethereal fabric.
Change the lighting to a cool, moonlit night scene, making the field glow with bioluminescent flowers and giving the woman's dress a soft, ethereal luminescence.

Transform the garden scene into a surreal, dreamlike landscape by changing the orange marigolds into glowing, bioluminescent blue flowers that emit a soft light, while keeping the green grass and background foliage in natural colors.

text: Transform the LEGO snail into a glowing bioluminescent creature by giving it a soft blue and purple neon glow, especially along the edges of its shell and body, while keeping the background a light blue gradient.

demos.text: Change the snail's shell to a gradient of blue and white, resembling a seashell, while keeping the rest of the felt snail the same.
Change the LEGO dinosaur head to a blue color while keeping all other details the same.

Transform the wooden letter 'N' into a glowing neon sign with a vibrant blue outline and a soft white inner glow, while keeping the clay nautilus figure intact and slightly illuminated by the neon light.

Transform the scene into a vibrant underwater environment with soft blue lighting, adding bubbles rising from the base and a coral reef background to make the LEGO robot appear as if it's exploring the ocean floor.
Transform the wooden dinosaur toy into a glowing, bioluminescent version with soft blue and purple light emanating from its body and spines, set against a dark, starry night sky background.

Transform the figurine into a nighttime scene with glowing neon lights, making the animals and boat emit a bright blue and purple neon glow while the background becomes a dark cityscape with neon signs.
Transform the scene into a nighttime setting with glowing, bioluminescent blocks that emit soft blue and purple light, creating a magical, dreamlike atmosphere.
Change the product labels to feature a vibrant tropical theme with palm trees and ocean waves instead of the current snail design, while keeping the container shape and color the same.

text: Change the color scheme of the gallery to a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk style, with glowing pink and blue lights illuminating the portraits and casting colorful reflections on the walls and floor.

demos.text: Convert the black and white gallery scene into a vibrant color photograph, adding warm golden lighting from the ceiling fixtures and rich, varied colors to the artwork on the walls, the clothing of the visitors, and the bottles on the tables.

Transform the gallery into a futuristic sci-fi museum exhibit by replacing the text panels and photographs with glowing holographic displays showing animated data streams and digital art, while changing the lighting to cool blue and purple neon hues.

Transform the gallery space into a futuristic museum exhibit with holographic displays floating above the tables, glowing digital text on the walls, and a subtle blue ambient light illuminating the room.
Change the lighting in the gallery to a warm, golden sunset glow, making the light appear to stream in from the far end of the hallway and cast long, soft shadows on the floor.

Change the dominant color scheme from neutral gallery tones to vibrant neon colors, making the artwork and the soup can sculpture glow with neon pink, blue, and green hues while keeping the gallery space dimly lit.

Transform the gallery space into a futuristic cyberpunk environment by adding neon lights in blue and purple hues, covering the walls and ceiling with digital displays showing abstract data streams, and replacing the artworks with holographic projections of glowing geometric shapes.

Transform the gallery space into a futuristic cyberpunk environment by replacing the wooden log sculptures and handwritten scroll with glowing neon-lit data streams and holographic projections, while keeping the industrial architecture and the two people in the background.

Change the color scheme to a warm, golden hour lighting effect, making the white walls and concrete floor appear as if bathed in soft, golden sunlight. Replace the blue geometric tapestry with a textured, amber-colored fabric, and change the yellow circular artwork to a glowing, molten gold disc.

text: Change the earring design to feature a celestial theme with gold stars, crescent moons, and small planets instead of feathers and bows, while keeping the same hook style and overall structure.

demos.text: Change the earring design from bird motifs to celestial symbols, replacing the birds with silver moon and star charms while keeping the red and white beads.
Change the color of the bow earrings from silver to a vibrant gold, enhancing the metallic sheen and making them appear more luxurious.
Change the earring design from leaf-shaped to a star constellation pattern with small sparkling stars connected by thin golden lines, keeping the overall dangle style and gold color.
Change the earring design to a minimalist style with small, geometric gold studs instead of the current elaborate beaded chandelier design.
Change the earrings to have a warm gold tone instead of white gold, and replace the clear diamonds with deep sapphire blue gemstones, while keeping the same fan and teardrop design.
Change the style of all earrings to a minimalist, geometric design using clean lines and monochromatic silver tones.
Change the earrings to have a silver finish instead of gold, while maintaining the hammered texture and clear crystal pendant.
Change the earrings to have a golden color instead of silver, while keeping the intricate key design and diamond details.

text: Convert the infographic into a vintage travel poster style, using muted earth tones and sepia highlights, with hand-drawn typography and subtle paper texture overlay.

demos.text: Transform the infographic into a vintage newspaper layout with sepia tones, adding aged paper texture and torn edges, and replacing the green accents with faded ink stains.

Convert the image to a vibrant watercolor style, maintaining the vintage poster layout and text, but rendering the illustration of Einstein and all text elements with soft, blended watercolor textures and colors.
Transform the poster into a vintage, aged paper style with torn edges, faded green ink, and subtle stains, giving it the appearance of an old, well-used technical manual from the 1980s.

Change the color scheme of the infographic to a dark mode theme, replacing the white background with a deep navy blue, using light blue and white text, and making the medical figures wear dark scrubs with glowing accents.

Transform the journal pages into a vintage, aged parchment style with sepia tones and subtle water stains, while keeping the handwritten text and illustrations visible but giving them an antique look.
Change the color scheme to a monochromatic blue palette, making the entire poster appear as if illuminated by moonlight, while keeping all text and elements clearly readable.
Transform the document into a vintage blueprint style with faded blue lines and technical annotations, giving it the appearance of an old engineering schematic.
Transform the image into a vintage stained glass window style, with rich jewel tones and dark lead lines separating each panel, while keeping the educational content and layout intact.

text: Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting with soft, blended edges and visible brushstrokes, maintaining the autumn colors and the person's silhouette.

demos.text: Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting, enhancing the autumn colors with soft, blended washes and visible brushstrokes while maintaining the misty valley's atmospheric depth.
Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting, enhancing the textures of the trees and grass with soft, blended brushstrokes while maintaining the natural composition.

Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting, blending the sunset hues with soft, diffused edges and visible brushstrokes, while maintaining the silhouette of the snow-covered tree and the layered fog.
Transform the image into a misty morning scene with soft fog rolling through the forest valleys and a golden sunrise casting warm light through the trees.
Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting, softening the edges and blending the colors of the mountains, lake, and sky with fluid brushstrokes.

Transform the scene into a vibrant autumn landscape by changing the foliage colors to rich yellows, oranges, and reds, while keeping the village and hills in the background. Enhance the lighting to a warm golden hour glow.
Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting, emphasizing soft edges and translucent layers in the clouds and foliage, with a focus on rich green and deep blue hues.
Change the season from winter to summer by replacing the snow with green grass, adding lush foliage to the trees, and making the lake water appear warmer and more reflective of a sunny day.

text: Transform the scene into a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape at night, with the SUV glowing in electric blue and purple hues, rain creating light trails, and futuristic holographic signs floating in the background.

demos.text: Change the police car to a bright red emergency vehicle with flashing blue and red lights, while keeping the surrounding environment and other vehicles the same.
Change the scene from a daytime parking lot to a nighttime urban environment with glowing neon lights reflecting on the wet pavement and the cars.
Change the scene to a nighttime setting with a full moon, making the lake reflect the moonlight and adding a soft glow to the car's headlights and taillights.

Transform the scene into a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape at night, with glowing holographic advertisements, augmented reality overlays, and rain-slicked streets reflecting the colorful lights.
Change the lighting to late afternoon golden hour, casting long shadows and warm sunlight on the vehicles and building.
Change the car's color to a metallic deep blue and add a light misty fog around the wheels to create a sleek, mysterious atmosphere.

Transform the truck into a futuristic concept vehicle with glowing blue energy lines running along its body, a translucent carbon fiber exterior, and holographic displays on the side panels showing speed and performance metrics.
Change the white Ford Explorer to a vibrant red color while keeping the dealership background and lighting the same.

text: Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and a palette of teal, coral, and warm gold accents, while keeping the woman's pose and the gym environment recognizable.

demos.text: Change the woman's outfit to a traditional Japanese kimono with a vibrant cherry blossom pattern, while keeping her pose and the studio background.

Change the lighting to a dramatic, moody blue and purple neon glow, making the gym environment feel like a futuristic cyberpunk training facility while keeping the woman's form and the dumbbells intact.
Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and translucent color washes, while keeping the woman's pose and the fitness equipment clearly recognizable.
Change the lighting to a warm golden hour glow, making the gym appear sunlit with long shadows and a soft, glowing atmosphere, while keeping the woman's muscular definition and pose intact.
Change the lighting to a warm, golden sunset glow, making the scene feel like it's taking place during a late afternoon workout session with a soft, glowing atmosphere.
Change the background to a vibrant sunset beach scene with palm trees and ocean waves, while keeping the woman in the same pose and outfit.
Change the athletic outfit to a vibrant, tropical-themed swimsuit with palm leaf patterns and a halter neck design, while keeping the woman's pose and background neutral.
Transform the image into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft, blended edges and visible brushstroke textures, while maintaining the woman's joyful expression and running pose.

text: Change the scene to a futuristic version with neon lights, holographic signs, and advanced combat gear, transforming the setting into a cyberpunk warehouse district.

demos.text: Transform the scene into a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk alleyway at night, with glowing holographic signs, rain-slicked streets reflecting neon colors, and futuristic architecture replacing the wooden buildings.

Transform the scene into a retro-futuristic 1960s suburban dream, with vibrant turquoise and coral color scheme, adding vintage sci-fi elements like a hovering lawn ornament, a retro-futuristic mailbox, and a glowing solar panel array.

Change the scene from a modern military engagement to a futuristic sci-fi setting by replacing the weapons with advanced energy rifles, adding glowing elements to the characters' gear, and transforming the city skyline into a neon-lit, high-tech metropolis with flying vehicles.
Change the scene to a nighttime setting with the bridge illuminated by warm streetlights and the sun replaced by a bright moon, creating a serene and mystical atmosphere.

Convert the scene into a surreal, dreamlike atmosphere by changing the time of day to twilight, adding a soft purple and pink glow in the sky, and making the soldiers' uniforms and vehicles appear semi-transparent with a faint neon outline.
Change the red vintage car in the sleigh to a futuristic, glowing blue hovercraft with soft light trails.
Change the lighting to a warm, orange glow coming from the ceiling, creating a tense, fire-lit atmosphere in the abandoned warehouse.
Change the color scheme to a dramatic sunset scene, replacing the daytime lighting with warm orange and red hues, making the sky glow and casting long shadows.

text: Change the large billboard to display a vibrant watercolor-style painting of a cityscape instead of the current advertisement.

demos.text: Change the large blue advertisement to display a glowing, neon-lit cityscape at night instead of the current portrait, while keeping the rest of the scene unchanged.

Transform the scene into a retro 1980s neon aesthetic with exaggerated, glowing signage in bold pink, purple, and electric green, replacing the existing ads with vintage arcade game titles and synthwave-style fonts.
Transform the building into a vibrant watercolor painting style, with soft edges and blended colors, while keeping the ibis budget signage legible.

Transform the scene into a vibrant, neon-lit cyberpunk cityscape at night, with glowing pink and blue holographic signs replacing the existing ones, rain reflecting the neon lights, and futuristic pedestrians in sleek, glowing attire.

Change the large central advertisement to display a futuristic cityscape at night with neon lights, replacing the fashion models while keeping the woman in the white dress and the surrounding digital displays unchanged.
Change the scene to a rainy evening, with wet pavement reflecting the streetlights and the man holding an umbrella while still posting the sign.
Transform the scene into a vibrant watercolor painting, blending the cityscape with soft, flowing colors while maintaining the architectural details of the buildings and the pedestrian activity.
Change the billboard's background to a dark night sky with stars, and replace the bright neon "thumbs up" with a glowing crescent moon and stars, while keeping the characters and text the same.

text: Change the color scheme to a sunset ocean theme, making the background a deep orange and purple gradient, turning the sea creatures into silhouettes with glowing outlines, and changing the text to white with a soft glow.

demos.text: Change the color scheme to a dark, stormy nighttime ocean theme with deep navy and black blues, add glowing bioluminescent jellyfish and underwater cave formations in the background, and make the text on the scroll appear as if written in glowing seaweed ink.
Change the color scheme to a warm sunset palette, making the fish and bubbles glow with orange and gold hues while keeping the text and graduation cap in dark blue.

Change the swimwear to have a tropical beach theme with palm trees and suns in bright orange and turquoise on the yellow top, and convert the shark pattern on the shorts to a colorful coral reef with tropical fish.

Change the navy blue long-sleeve shirt to have a bright red background with the text "MAR" in white, and transform the gray shirt to have a deep green background with the "SAVE OUR DINOSAURS" logo in white.

Change the color scheme to a nighttime ocean theme, making the wall a deep navy blue and replacing the letters with glowing bioluminescent colors—teal, yellow, and white—with small glowing fish swimming around the letters.
Change the color scheme from warm yellows and reds to cool blues and purples, transforming the sunset into a nighttime scene with a glowing moon and stars.
Change the coral t-shirt to a vibrant tropical beach scene with palm trees and a sunset, while keeping the navy blue pants and overall layout.

Transform the underwater scene into a nighttime version with a dark blue, moonlit ocean, add glowing bioluminescent elements to the fish and seaweed, and replace the bubbles with sparkling light particles.

text: Transform the modern house into a cozy mountain cabin with a stone and wood exterior, adding a warm, glowing porch light and a rustic wooden deck with a fire pit, while keeping the surrounding forest and rocky landscape.

demos.text: Transform the modern house into a cozy cabin with warm wooden siding and a stone chimney, surrounded by a dense autumn forest with golden and red leaves.
Transform the modern wooden house into a cozy, snow-covered cabin with warm glowing windows, surrounded by a winter forest with falling snow.
Change the house's exterior to a rustic stone facade with dark wooden beams, transforming it into a mountain cabin style while keeping the same layout and surrounding landscape.
Transform the modern house into a cozy, rustic cabin with weathered wood siding, a stone fireplace facade, and a thatched roof, while keeping the surrounding garden and water feature.

Transform the scene into a snowy winter landscape, with a light blanket of snow covering the ground, steps, and surrounding foliage, while the cabin remains warm and lit from within, creating a cozy contrast.
Transform the modern house interior into a cozy, rustic cabin with wood-paneled walls, stone fireplace, and warm, ambient lighting from lanterns and candles.

Change the modern house to have a rustic wooden cabin aesthetic, replacing the white concrete walls with weathered wood planks and the large glass windows with smaller, traditional wooden-framed windows. Add a stone fireplace on the exterior and replace the white sofa with a wooden bench.

Transform the house into a glowing, futuristic bioluminescent structure with soft blue and green light emanating from its walls and windows, while keeping the surrounding forest and architecture structure intact.

text: Convert the entire image to a vibrant color palette, enhancing the whites of the wedding dress and veil, the reds of the groom's tie, and the natural skin tones, while maintaining the black and white architecture and background for contrast.

demos.text: Convert the image to a vibrant color palette, enhancing the wedding dress to a soft ivory with subtle gold embroidery, the bouquet to include rich burgundy and blush roses, and the suit to a deep navy blue, while maintaining the black and white background and guests for contrast.

Convert the image to a vibrant color palette with golden hour lighting, making the bride's dress glow with soft white and cream tones, the groom's suit a deep navy, and the background a warm blend of orange and golden hues.

Convert the image to a vibrant color palette, enhancing the bride's dress to a soft ivory with delicate lace details, the groom's suit to a rich charcoal gray, and the background tapestry to a lush tropical green with warm golden sunlight streaming through the doorway.

Convert the black and white wedding scene into a vibrant color image with warm golden hour lighting, enhancing the bride's dress with a soft ivory hue and the groom's suit with a deep navy blue, while adding a subtle warm glow to the string lights.
Convert the image to a vibrant color palette, enhancing the warm tones of the string lights and giving the bride's dress a soft cream hue, while the groom's suit takes on a deep charcoal tone.

Convert the black and white wedding scene into a vibrant color photograph, enhancing the natural tones of the bride's dress, the groom's suit, and the surrounding flowers while maintaining the formal and joyful atmosphere.

Convert the black and white image into a vibrant color photograph, enhancing the natural tones of the wedding scene with soft daylight. The bride's dress should appear as pure white, the bridesmaids' dresses as a subtle pastel gray, the grooms' suits as deep navy, and the surrounding foliage as rich green. The dome of the chapel should take on a warm beige stone hue, and the sky should be a clear, bright blue with soft white clouds.

Convert the image to a vibrant color palette, making the bride's white dress and veil a soft ivory, the groom's suit a deep navy, and the flowers in the bouquet a mix of blush pink and cream. Add warm, golden lighting to the scene to create a romantic evening atmosphere.

text: Transform the bedroom into a cozy winter retreat by adding a light dusting of snow outside the windows, changing the lighting to a soft, warm golden hour glow, and replacing the green tree with a small decorated Christmas tree next to the rocking chair.

demos.text: Transform the bedroom into a cozy winter retreat by adding a light snowfall outside the window, changing the rug to a plush dark green velvet, and adding a warm glowing fireplace on the right wall.

Transform the bedroom into a cozy winter retreat by adding a light dusting of snow on the windowsills, a soft layer of white snow outside the windows, and a glowing fire in the fireplace that casts a warm, flickering light across the room.

Transform the room into a cozy winter evening scene by changing the lighting to warm golden tones, adding soft snow falling outside the arched windows, and replacing the daytime view with a snowy forest landscape.

Transform the bedroom into a cozy winter retreat by adding a light dusting of snow on the windowsill and outside the window, changing the lighting to a soft, cool blue twilight, and adding a thick, knitted blanket over the bed.
Transform the bedroom into a cozy winter retreat by adding a light dusting of snow on the windowsill and a soft, warm glow from a fireplace that appears in the corner, replacing the current lamp.

Transform the bedroom into a winter retreat by adding a light layer of snow on the window sills, rooftops, and outdoor garden, and change the lighting to a soft, cool blue tone to suggest a moonlit night.

Transform the room into a cozy winter retreat by adding a light dusting of snow outside the window, changing the sunlight to a soft golden dusk, and replacing the green plant with a small potted evergreen. Add a knitted throw blanket and a pair of woolen slippers on the rug.

Transform the bedroom into a cozy winter retreat by adding a light dusting of snow on the windowsill and outdoor ground, changing the lighting to a soft, cool blue evening glow, and replacing the artwork with a snowy mountain landscape.
